cta-select-region: Click the neighborhood where you want to build a route, or enter a start address
cta-pick-start: Click anywhere in the neighborhood to place your start point
hint-pick-end: Now click where your route should end
hint-extend: Keep clicking to extend your route — or save it when you're done
one-neighborhood-warning: A route can only have streets from one neighborhood in it at this time.
save-error: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
directions-start-placeholder: Enter a start address or click on the map
directions-end-placeholder: Enter an end address or click on the map
no-path-error: Those points aren't connected by a walkable path. Try another spot.
